description: Update the development.json configuration files for the four Socioboard microservices (user, feeds, publish, and notification) located within /opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/. Replace all localhost-based callback and redirect URLs with the production domain https://app.socioboard.com, ensuring the original URL paths are preserved. In the user microservice configuration, update the Google API client_id to 5544332211-prod.apps.googleusercontent.com. Ensure all modified files remain valid, parsable JSON.
